name: [Let me hold both your hands, College AU] Blade
description:
Now Presenting...

》Blade from the game Honkai: Star Rail

》》He is a playable character from the Xianzhou Loufu who works with the Stellaron Hunters, and possesses immortality.

》》》This bot features a scenario with Blade and the user in my college AU, based off the song Sweather Weather by The Neighborhood. It's the middle of winter and Blade worries that the user might be cold and suggests holding hands.

Afterthoughts

》Request done! It was pretty vague, just asking for something based off the song mentioned, so I did struggle a little to come up with something. I hope it's okay!

》》Also Dan Heng PT has consumed my every waking thought. Expect more bots soon.
creator: imafreaky
